textOrAudio.staticTextWarning: This text will be spoken verbatim by the AI. For realtime (speech-to-speech) models there is no TTS stage so static text is never spoken — use a pre-recorded audio file instead.

genericNode.webhookDescription: Use the URLs below to trigger this agent from an external system. Generate an API key
genericNode.testUrlDescription: Use this URL for testing. Calls placed via this endpoint use your test telephony configuration.
genericNode.productionUrlDescription: Use this URL for production traffic.

parameterEditor.noParameters: No parameters defined. Add a parameter to specify what data this tool needs.
parameterEditor.name: Name
parameterEditor.nameDescription: Name of the parameter, like "order_id" or "customer_name"
parameterEditor.typeDescription: Type of the parameter, like "string" or "number" or "boolean"
parameterEditor.descriptionHelp: Description of the parameter, which makes it easy for LLM to understand, like "The ID of the Customer to fetch Order Details"
parameterEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this parameter is for...
parameterEditor.noPresetParameters: No preset parameters defined. Add one to inject a fixed value or workflow context into the request.
parameterEditor.presetNameDescription: Key sent to the API, like "phone_number" or "customer_id"
parameterEditor.presetTypeDescription: JSON type to send to the API
parameterEditor.valueOrTemplateDescription: Use a fixed value or a template like {{initial_context.phone_number}} or {{gathered_context.customer_id}}

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Manage your bulk workflow execution campaigns

new.title: Create New Campaign
new.description: Set up a new campaign to execute workflows at scale
new.campaignNameHelp: Choose a descriptive name for your campaign
new.workflowHelp: Select the workflow to execute for each row in the data source
new.telephonyConfigHelp2: Outbound calls for this campaign will use this configuration's caller IDs
new.sourceTypeHelp: Choose where your contact data is stored

errors.maxConcurrency: Max concurrent calls must be between 1 and 100
errors.maxConcurrencyExceedsPhones: Max concurrent calls cannot exceed {limit}. The selected configuration has {count} phone number(s) - add more CLIs to increase concurrency.
errors.maxConcurrencyExceedsOrg: Max concurrent calls cannot exceed organization limit ({limit})

errors.redialReasonRequired: Select at least one reason to redial

detail.activityLogDesc: Recent state transitions and failures. Newest first.
detail.redialDialogDesc: Creates a new campaign that re-dials unique subscribers whose last call ended with one of the selected outcomes. Subscribers who were successfully reached on a retry are skipped.

errors.maxConcurrency: Max concurrent calls must be between 1 and 100
errors.maxConcurrencyExceedsPhones: Max concurrent calls cannot exceed {limit}. You have {count} phone number(s) configured - add more CLIs to increase concurrency.
errors.maxConcurrencyExceedsOrg: Max concurrent calls cannot exceed organization limit ({limit})
errors.addTimeSlot: Add at least one time slot
errors.startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time for each slot

edit.title: Edit Campaign
edit.settingsDesc: Update name, concurrency, retry, and schedule configuration

advancedSettings.maxConcurrencyDescription: Maximum number of simultaneous calls. Leave empty to use {effectiveLimit}.
advancedSettings.circuitBreakerDescription: Auto-pause campaign on high failure rates
advancedSettings.failureThresholdDescription: Pause when failure rate exceeds this percentage
advancedSettings.phoneNumbersWarning: No phone numbers configured. Add CLIs in
advancedSettings.concurrencyLimitedWarning: Concurrency is limited to {count} by your configured phone numbers. To use the full org limit of {orgLimit}, add more CLIs in

runs.title: Campaign Workflow Runs
runs.empty: No workflow runs found for this campaign

configs.pageDescription: Connect one or more telephony provider accounts. Each campaign uses one configuration; inbound calls are routed to the right one by account ID.
configs.emptyDescription: Add one to enable outbound calls and receive inbound calls.
configs.setDefaultSuccess: {name} is now the default outbound configuration
configs.deleteConfirmDescription: {name} and all of its phone numbers will be removed. Any campaigns that reference this configuration will block the deletion until they are reassigned.

configDetail.copyWebhookTitle: Click to copy inbound webhook URL
configDetail.whatsappDescription: WhatsApp sessions paired via QR code for this configuration.
configDetail.phoneNumbersDescription: Numbers used as caller ID for outbound and accepted for inbound matching. SIP URIs and extensions are supported alongside PSTN numbers.
configDetail.noNumbers: No phone numbers yet. Add one to start placing or receiving calls on this configuration.
configDetail.setDefaultCallerSuccess: {address} is now the default caller ID
configDetail.deletePhoneConfirmDescription: {address} will no longer accept inbound calls or be available as a caller ID for this configuration.

configForm.editDescription: Update credentials for this configuration. Phone numbers are managed separately.
configForm.createDescription: Connect a telephony provider account. Phone numbers are added after the configuration is created.
configForm.providerLockedHint: Provider cannot be changed after creation.
configForm.defaultOutboundLabel: Set as default for outbound calls
configForm.defaultOutboundDescription: Used by test calls and campaigns when no specific config is selected.
configForm.fromNumbersHint: Phone numbers are managed separately on the configuration page.

phoneDialog.description: PSTN numbers (E.164), SIP URIs (sip:user@host), and SIP extensions are all supported.
phoneDialog.addressLockedHint: Address cannot be changed. Delete this number and create a new one to change it.
phoneDialog.workflowDescription: Used when per-number inbound routing is enabled. Today, inbound calls still route by the workflow_id in the webhook URL.
phoneDialog.defaultCallerLabel: Default caller ID for this configuration
phoneDialog.defaultCallerDescription: Used as the from-number for test calls when set.
phoneDialog.syncWarning: Saved, but failed to sync inbound webhook to the provider.

validation.addressMissingCountry: PSTN addresses without a leading '+' need a Country (ISO-2) hint, or include the country code in the address (e.g. +14155551234).

wacalls.scanQR: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp to connect
wacalls.scanInstructions: Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp app to link this session.
wacalls.sessionNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this session
wacalls.qrInstructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone, go to Settings → Linked Devices, and scan this QR code.

platformSettings.description: Manage your platform configuration and integrations.
platformSettings.preferencesDescription: Set organization-wide defaults such as the test phone number and timezone.
platformSettings.mcpServerDescription: Let AI agents access your Dograh workspace and documentation via the Model Context Protocol.
platformSettings.telemetryDescription: Configure Langfuse tracing for your voice agent calls.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.description: Manage audio recordings for your organization. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them, or as transition messages in tool calls.
recordings.allRecordingsDesc: Audio recordings shared across all agents in your organization

errors.idInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recording?
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by filename, transcript, or ID...
list.idUpdated: Recording ID updated to "{id}". All workflow references have been updated.

upload.title: Upload Recordings
upload.description: Upload or record audio files. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them into your agents.
upload.recordingTooLarge: Recording ({size}MB) exceeds the maximum allowed size of 5MB.
upload.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permissions.

files.title: Knowledge Base Files
files.description: Upload and manage documents for your voice agents to reference.
files.yourDocumentsDesc: Documents shared across all agents in your organization
files.uploadDialogDesc: Upload a PDF or document file to add to your knowledge base

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{filename}"?

upload.ossNoticeDesc: Uploaded documents are sent to Dograh's managed Model Proxy Service for parsing and chunking. Dograh Model Proxy Service does not store or read your documents - the extracted text and embeddings are returned and stored locally in your self-hosted database.

errors.unsupportedType: Please select a supported file type: {types}
errors.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB
errors.storageUpload: Failed to upload file to storage

upload.howToUse: How should the agent use this document?
upload.fullDocumentDesc: The entire document is provided to the agent on each retrieval. Best for menus, price lists, FAQs, and other small reference documents.
upload.chunkedSearchDesc: The document is split into chunks and the most relevant ones are retrieved. Better for large documents like manuals or policies.

navigation.actionRequiredAria: Action required on a telephony configuration

overview.welcomeDescriptionOSS: Open source alternative to Vapi. Help us support the project by giving us a star on GitHub.
overview.welcomeDescriptionCloud: Get started with building voice AI workflows
overview.agentsTitle: Create and Manage your Voice Agents
overview.agentsDescription: Build powerful AI Voice Agents with our visual editor
overview.servicesDescription: Set up your AI services like LLM, TTS, and STT providers
overview.resourcesDescription: Get help and learn more about Dograh

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Credits, balance, and account usage for your organization.
billing.creditLedgerDescription: Recent grants, purchases, and usage debits.
billing.ossDisabledTitle: Credit purchases are unavailable in OSS mode
billing.ossLine1: You can't purchase credits from this self-hosted app. Sign up and purchase credits at
billing.ossLine2: . Then add the generated service key in
billing.ossLine3: . Usage for that service key is visible in app.dograh.com.

list.title: Tools
list.description: Manage reusable tools that can be used across your workflows.
list.yourToolsDescription: Create and manage tools for your organization
list.createNewToolDescription: Create a new tool that can be used in your workflows.
list.toolNameHelp: Use a descriptive name, like "Get Weather using API" for a tool that fetches weather
list.descriptionHelp: Provide a description which makes it easy for LLM to understand what this tool does
list.credentialDescription: Select a credential for authenticating with the MCP server, or leave empty for no auth.
list.toolsFilterHelp: Comma-separated list of tool names to allow. Leave empty to expose all tools from the server.
list.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this tool?
list.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the tool
list.mcpUrlRequired: Please enter the MCP server URL
list.mcpUrlInvalid: MCP server URL must start with http:// or https://

description.httpApi: Make HTTP requests to external APIs
description.endCall: End the call when conditions are met
description.transferCall: Transfer the call to another phone number (Twilio only)
description.mcp: Connect a customer MCP server; its tools become available to the agent
description.native: Built-in tools like call transfer, DTMF input

description.endCall: End the call when either user asks to disconnect the call, or when you believe its time to end the conversation
description.transferCall: Transfer the caller to another phone number when requested

config.defaultEndCallReasonDescription: The reason for ending the call (e.g., 'voicemail_detected', 'issue_resolved', 'customer_requested')

detail.codePreviewDescription: JavaScript code to make this API call
detail.allResolverArgumentsRequired: All resolver arguments must have a name and description
detail.resolverArgumentNamesUnique: Resolver argument names must be unique
detail.allResolverPresetParamsRequired: All resolver preset parameters must have a name and a value
detail.resolverPresetParamNamesUnique: Resolver preset parameter names must be unique
detail.mcpUrlRequired: Please enter the MCP server URL
detail.mcpUrlInvalid: MCP server URL must start with http:// or https://
detail.allParamsMustHaveName: All parameters must have a name
detail.allPresetParamsMustHaveNameAndValue: All preset parameters must have a name and a value
detail.calculatorSubtitle: Built-in calculator for arithmetic operations. No additional configuration needed.
detail.mcpDescription: Configure the MCP server endpoint. Its tools become available to the agent.
detail.mcpDescriptionHelp: Provide a description which makes it easy for LLM to understand what this tool does
detail.mcpDescriptionPlaceholder: What does this MCP server provide?
detail.mcpCredentialDescription: Select a credential for authenticating with the MCP server, or leave empty for no auth.
detail.mcpToolsFilterHelp: Comma-separated list of tool names to allow. Leave empty to expose all tools from the server.

builtin.descriptionHelp: Provide a description which makes it easy for LLM to understand what this tool does

httpApi.title: Tool Configuration
httpApi.description: Configure the HTTP API endpoint and request settings
httpApi.toolNameHelp: Use a descriptive name, like "Get Weather using API" for a tool that fetches weather
httpApi.descriptionHelp: Provide a description which makes it easy for LLM to understand what this tool does
httpApi.customMessageHelp: Optional message the AI will speak or play before executing this tool.
httpApi.customMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Let me check that for you, one moment please.
httpApi.llmParametersHelp: Define the parameters that the LLM will provide when calling this tool. These will be sent as JSON body for POST/PUT/PATCH or as URL query params for GET/DELETE.
httpApi.presetParametersHelp: Add values that Dograh should inject at runtime. These are not exposed to the LLM and can use workflow templates like {{initial_context.phone_number}} or fixed literals.
httpApi.customHeadersHelp: Add custom headers to include in the request (optional)

endCall.title: End Call Configuration
endCall.description: Configure the behavior when the call ends
endCall.toolNameHelp: A descriptive name for this tool
endCall.descriptionHelp: Helps the LLM understand when to use this tool
endCall.descriptionPlaceholder: When should the AI end the call?
endCall.captureReasonHelp: When enabled, the AI will provide a reason for ending the call. The reason will be set as the call disposition and added to call tags for analytics.
endCall.reasonDescriptionHelp: Instructions shown to the AI for what kind of reason to provide
endCall.reasonDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., The reason for ending the call (e.g., 'voicemail_detected', 'issue_resolved', 'customer_requested')
endCall.goodbyeMessageHelp: Choose whether to play a message before disconnecting

option.noMessageDescription: End the call immediately without any message
option.customMessageDescription: Play a custom message before disconnecting
option.customMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Thank you for calling. Goodbye!
option.audioDescription: Play a pre-recorded audio file before disconnecting

transferCall.title: Transfer Call Configuration
transferCall.description: Configure call transfer settings. Supports phone numbers (Twilio) and SIP endpoints (Asterisk ARI).
transferCall.toolNameHelp: A descriptive name for this tool
transferCall.descriptionHelp: Helps the LLM understand when to use this tool
transferCall.descriptionPlaceholder: When should the AI transfer the call?
transferCall.preTransferMessageHelp: Choose whether to play a configured message before transferring. In dynamic mode, resolver custom_message overrides this when returned.

option.noMessageDescription: Transfer the call immediately without any message
option.customMessageDescription: Play a custom message before transferring
option.customMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Please hold while I transfer your call.
option.audioDescription: Play a pre-recorded audio file before transferring

transferCall.timeoutHelp: Maximum time to wait for destination to answer after the transfer starts (5-120 seconds)
transferCall.destinationSourceHelp: Choose whether the transfer uses a configured destination or resolves one from an HTTP endpoint.
transferCall.staticDestinationHelp1: Use a fixed number, SIP endpoint, or context template.
transferCall.dynamicDescription: Dograh sends the resolved argument dictionary to this endpoint. The endpoint must return transfer_context.destination and may return transfer_context.custom_message.
transferCall.resolverUrlHelp: Dograh sends a POST request with the resolved argument dictionary.
transferCall.resolverCredentialDescription: Select a credential for the resolver endpoint, or leave empty for no auth.
transferCall.resolverWaitMessagePlaceholder: One moment while I find the right team.
transferCall.resolverWaitMessageHelp: Spoken while Dograh waits for the resolver response.
transferCall.llmParametersHelp: Define values the agent should provide when calling this transfer tool, such as state, department, or reason.
transferCall.presetParametersHelp: Add values Dograh injects at runtime. These are not exposed to the LLM and can use templates like {{initial_context.state}} or {{gathered_context.state}}.
transferCall.customHeadersHelp: Add custom headers for authentication or routing metadata.

list.title: Your Agents
list.noWorkflows: No active workflows found. Create your first workflow to get started.
list.authRequired: Authentication required. Please refresh the page.
list.loadError: Failed to load Workflows. Please Try Again Later.

create.title: Create Voice Agent
create.subtitle: Tell us about your use case and we'll create a customized voice agent for you
create.callTypeHelp: Choose whether users will call your AI or your AI will call users
create.useCasePlaceholder: e.g., Lead Qualification, HR Screening, Customer Support
create.useCaseHelp: Describe the primary purpose of your voice agent
create.activityDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe briefly what your voice agent will do (e.g., Qualify leads for real estate, Screen candidates for roles, Handle customer support). This will be a prompt to an LLM.
create.activityDescriptionHelp: This description will be used to generate the AI prompt for your voice agent
create.authError: You must be logged in to create a workflow
create.apiError: Failed to create workflow. Please try again.
create.loadingDescription: We're setting up your voice agent with your specifications. This will just take a moment...
create.successDescription1: A voice agent workflow has been generated for your use case, with some artificial data and sample actions.
create.successDescription2: The voice bot is pre-set to communicate in English with an American accent.
create.successDescription3: Next steps would be to test the voice bot in the editor, and then modify it to suit your use case.

tester.authRequired: Authentication is required before testing can start.
tester.authRequiredBrowser: Authentication is required before browser tests can start.
tester.callAgentTitle: Call this agent in the browser
tester.callAgentDescription: Test the agent over a voice call. Some telephony-only tools, like call transfer, are not yet supported here.
tester.onboardingMessage: Start a browser call here to hear the agent, inspect the transcript, and validate the workflow before you customize it further.

configurations.title: Configurations
configurations.ambientNoiseDescription: Add background office ambient noise to make the conversation sound more natural.
configurations.turnDetectionDescription: Configure how the agent detects when the user has finished speaking.
configurations.transcriptionDescription: Best for short responses (1-2 word statements). Ends turn when transcription indicates completion.
configurations.turnAnalyzerDescription: Best for longer responses with natural pauses. Uses ML model to detect end of turn.
configurations.incompleteTurnTimeoutDescription: Max silence duration before ending an incomplete turn. Default: 2 seconds
configurations.interruptionDescription: Configure when user speech should interrupt the agent while it is speaking.
configurations.minWordsDescription: Number of transcribed words needed to interrupt while the bot is speaking. Default: {default}
configurations.provisionalPauseDescription: Seconds to pause bot audio while waiting for transcript confirmation. Default: {default}
configurations.contextCompactionDescription: Automatically summarize conversation context when transitioning between nodes. Removes stale tool calls and keeps the context clean for the new node.
configurations.callManagementDescription: Configure call duration limits and idle timeout settings.

phoneCall.title: Phone Call
phoneCall.description: Enter the phone number or SIP endpoint to call. The number will be saved automatically.
phoneCall.configureTelephonyDescription: You need to configure your telephony settings before making phone calls. You will be redirected to the telephony configuration page.
phoneCall.noPhoneNumbers: No phone numbers in this configuration. The provider will pick one automatically.

recordings.recordingTooLarge: Recording ({size}MB) exceeds the maximum allowed size of 5MB.
recordings.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permissions.
recordings.ttsConfigRequired: TTS configuration (provider, model, voice) must be set in your user configuration before uploading.
recordings.title: Workflow Recordings
recordings.description: Upload or record audio for hybrid prompts. Recordings are scoped to your current TTS configuration. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them.
recordings.noTtsConfig: No TTS configuration found. Set it in Model Configurations.
recordings.noRecordings: No recordings yet for this TTS configuration.

embed.description: Add "{workflowName}" to any website with a simple script tag.
embed.enableEmbeddingDescription: Allow this workflow to be embedded on external websites
embed.leaveEmptyAllDomains: leave empty to allow all domains
embed.floatingWidgetDescription: Shows as a button in corner of the page
embed.inlineComponentDescription: Embeds directly in your page content
embed.headlessDescription: No UI - drive calls from your own buttons via the JS API
embed.headlessStep1: • Add the embed script tag to your page (see below).
embed.headlessStep2: • The widget renders no UI - render your own buttons.
embed.headlessStep3: • Call window.DograhWidget.start() to begin a call.
embed.headlessStep5: • Subscribe to onCallStart, onCallEnd, onStatusChange, onError to drive your UI.
embed.headlessStep6: • start() must run inside a user-gesture handler (click) so the browser grants microphone access.
embed.exampleTrackStatus: Example - track status in your own state
embed.exampleTrackStatusDesc: Mirror the call status into a variable you control, then render whatever UI you like from it. The status values are idle, connecting, connected, failed.
embed.inlineStep1: • Add a div with id="dograh-inline-container" where you want the widget
embed.inlineStep2: • The widget will render inside this container
embed.inlineStep3: • You have full control over the container's styling
embed.inlineStep4: • Call window.DograhWidget.start() to begin the call
embed.inlineStep5: • Call window.DograhWidget.end() to end the call
embed.embedCodeDescription: Add this script to your website's HTML to enable the voice widget. Configuration changes will apply automatically without re-embedding.
embed.saveToGenerate: Click Save Configurations to generate your embed script.

settings.reportDescription: Download a CSV report of completed runs for this agent, optionally filtered by date range.
settings.generalDescription: Agent name, call behavior, and turn detection.
settings.ambientNoiseDescription: Add background ambient noise to make the conversation sound more natural.
settings.customAudioFileDescription: Upload your own audio file or use the default office ambience.
settings.turnDetectionDescription: Configure how the agent detects when the user has finished speaking.
settings.transcriptionDescription: Best for short responses (1-2 word statements). Ends turn when transcription indicates completion.
settings.turnAnalyzerDescription: Best for longer responses with natural pauses. Uses ML model to detect end of turn.
settings.incompleteTurnTimeoutDescription: Max silence duration before ending an incomplete turn. Default: 2 seconds
settings.interruptionDescription: Configure when user speech should interrupt the agent while it is speaking.
settings.minWordsDescription: Number of transcribed words needed to interrupt while the bot is speaking. Default: {default}
settings.provisionalPauseDescription: Seconds to pause bot audio while waiting for transcript confirmation. Default: {default}
settings.transcriptDescription: Include start and stop timestamps for each speaker in the uploaded transcript.
settings.contextCompactionDescription: Automatically summarize conversation context when transitioning between nodes. Not applicable in Realtime mode - the speech-to-speech service manages its own conversation state and this setting is ignored.
settings.callManagementDescription: Configure call duration limits and idle timeout settings.
settings.templateVariablesDescription: Variables available in workflow prompts via {{variable_name}} syntax for testing the workflow.
settings.dictionaryDescription: Add words the agent should actively listen for — company jargon, names, industry terms. May incur extra cost depending on provider.
settings.dictionaryPlaceholder: Enter words separated by comma (e.g. billing department, tretinoin)
settings.voicemailDetectionDescription: Automatically detect and end calls when a voicemail system is reached.
settings.useWorkflowLlmDescription: Use the LLM configured in your account settings.
settings.systemPromptDescription: The LLM must respond with either "CONVERSATION" or "VOICEMAIL".
settings.speechCutoffDescription: Trigger classification early if first turn speech exceeds this duration.
settings.agentUuidDescription: Stable identifier for this agent. Used in agent-stream URLs and other integrations where a numeric workflow ID isn't portable.
settings.modelOverridesDescription: Override the full organization model configuration for this workflow.
settings.setupOrgModelConfig: Set up your organization model configuration before overriding it per workflow.
settings.usesOwnModelConfig: This workflow uses its own complete model configuration.
settings.usesOrgModelConfig: This workflow uses the organization model configuration.
settings.recordingsDescription: Recordings are now managed at the organization level and shared across all agents. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them.
settings.addToWebsiteDescription: Configure a widget to add this voice agent to your website.

run.completedDescription: Your voice agent run has been completed successfully. You can preview or download the transcript and recording.
run.textChatDescription: Review the conversation history, metrics, and context captured for this text session.
run.detailsUnavailableDescription: This run does not have a details view yet. Go back to the workflow to continue testing or make changes.
run.customizeWorkflowTooltipMessage: Edit your workflow to adjust the voice agent's behavior, add new steps, or modify the conversation flow.

voicemail.title: Voicemail Detection
voicemail.description: Configure voicemail detection to automatically detect and end calls when a voicemail system is reached.
voicemail.useWorkflowLlmDescription: Use the LLM configured in your account settings.
voicemail.systemPromptDescription: Prompt for voicemail classification. The LLM must respond with either "CONVERSATION" or "VOICEMAIL".
voicemail.speechCutoffDescription: Trigger classification early if first turn speech exceeds this duration.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Add any specific words that you would want the bot to actively listen for. The Voice Agent learns your unique words and names. Add expected words and phrases, company jargon, named entities, or industry-specific lingo. (May incur extra cost depending on provider)

templateVariables.title: Template Context Variables
templateVariables.description: Add or remove template context variables that will be available to your workflow. You can use these variables within your workflow nodes within double curly braces.

aiSimulator.defaultPrompt: Act like a skeptical prospect. Push on pricing, ask about integrations, and end the chat if the assistant becomes repetitive.
aiSimulator.description: Drive multi-turn, agent-vs-agent tests with a persona prompt.

apiError.purchaseCredits: Purchase credits to continue using the service.

audio.micAccessDeniedDescription: Please allow microphone access in your browser settings to use voice calling.
audio.allowMicDialog: Allow microphone access when prompted by your browser.
audio.clickToGrant: Click the button below to grant audio permissions.

context.keyExists: A variable with this key already exists.

realtimeFeedback.noConversationSubtitle: This run did not have a realtime feedback session.
realtimeFeedback.noMessagesReady: Start a call to see messages here.

folderSection.deleteConfirmDescription: This will delete the folder and move {count} agent(s) to Uncategorized.

usage.title: Agent Runs
usage.description: See all your Agent Runs across all Voice Agents. You can use filters to filter out required Agent Runs.
usage.allRunsDescription: Every agent run across your organization, with usage details

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Automate your workflows and save time
automation.comingSoonDescription: Automation features are currently under development.
automation.workingOn: We're working on bringing you powerful automation tools to streamline your workflow execution.
automation.featureList: Features will include: scheduled triggers, webhook integrations, conditional branching, and more.

apiKeys.title: Developer Portal
apiKeys.description: Manage your API keys to access Dograh services programmatically
apiKeys.apiKeysDescription: Create and manage API keys for your organization
apiKeys.serviceKeysDescription: Manage service keys for accessing Dograh AI services (LLM, TTS, STT)
apiKeys.securityWarning: Keep your API keys secure. Never share them publicly or commit them to version control. API keys provide full access to your organization's resources.

createKeyDialog.title: Create New API Key
createKeyDialog.description: Enter a descriptive name for your API key to help you identify it later.

keyCreatedDialog.title: API Key Created Successfully
keyCreatedDialog.description: Make sure to copy your API key now. You won’t be able to see it again!
keyCreatedDialog.storeSecurely: Store this key securely. It will only be shown once and cannot be retrieved later.

createServiceKeyDialog.title: Create New Service Key
createServiceKeyDialog.description: Create a service key to access Dograh AI services (LLM, TTS, STT)
createServiceKeyDialog.keyNamePlaceholder: e.g., Production AI Services, Development LLM Access

serviceKeyCreatedDialog.title: Service Key Created Successfully
serviceKeyCreatedDialog.description: Make sure to copy your service key now. You won’t be able to see it again!
serviceKeyCreatedDialog.keyInfo: This key provides access to Dograh AI services including LLM, Text-to-Speech, and Speech-to-Text.
serviceKeyCreatedDialog.storeSecurely: Store this key securely. It will only be shown once and cannot be retrieved later.

errors.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the API key
errors.serviceNameRequired: Please enter a name for the service key

superadmin.title: Superadmin
superadmin.description: Impersonate users and manage workflow runs across the platform.
superadmin.enterProviderId: Please enter a provider user ID
superadmin.providerUserIdDescription: Impersonate a user by their provider user ID.
superadmin.emailDescription: Impersonate a user by their email address.
superadmin.workflowRunsDescription: View all workflow runs across the platform.

runs.title: Workflow Runs
runs.description: View all workflow runs across all users and organizations.
runs.noRunsFound: No runs found matching your filters.

modelConfig.title: AI Models Configuration
modelConfig.loadDefaultsError: Failed to load model configuration defaults
modelConfig.realtimeDescription: A single speech-to-speech model handles the conversation in realtime (no separate transcriber or voice). An LLM is still required for variable extraction and QA.
modelConfig.dograhDescriptionBefore: Dograh provides a managed transcriber, LLM, and voice pipeline. Select a voice and language while Dograh manages the underlying model providers.
modelConfig.dograhDescriptionPricing: We offer custom pricing and a 15-second pulse with a monthly commitment.
modelConfig.byokDescription: Configure separate transcriber, LLM, and voice providers using your own API keys. An embeddings model can also be configured for knowledge retrieval.
modelConfig.thirdPartyNoticeBody: Dograh sends data required by the selected model service. This may include prompts, transcripts, audio, generated text, tool data, and request metadata depending on the provider and service type. Review the provider's data and retention policies before using sensitive data.
